description: Resolve constraint violations in the Secret Santa gift exchange spreadsheet, including self-assignments, spouse pairings, and missing data. Standardize the budgets and ensure the exchange forms a valid gift-giving cycle.

natural_language.prompt: Fix the Secret Santa spreadsheet by correcting all constraint violations: no self-assignments, no spouse pairings, complete all missing assignments, standardize budgets to numeric values, and ensure everyone gives to exactly one person and receives from exactly one person.
